items.title: Destiny Wealth Sells $8.1 Million in IBB Shares — Here’s Why Biotech Stocks Are Lagging
items.author: Jonathan Ponciano
items.description: Destiny Wealth Partners sold $8.1 million in iShares Biotechnology ETF shares, reflecting broader institutional investor cooling on the biotech sector, with the ETF underperforming the S&P 500 this year.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Down about 5% over the past year, trailing S&P 500's 18% gain, with major holdings like Vertex Pharmaceuticals and Amgen experiencing stock declines
Stock down approximately 8% over the past year
Stock down approximately 7% over the past year

items.title: Amgen Unveils New DTC Program, Cuts Cholesterol Drug Price by 60%
items.description: AMGN rolls out AmgenNow, a direct-to-consumer program debuting with Repatha at a 60% lower price to boost patient access and affordability.
